channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Territorial Gains Turn Negative for First Time Since 2023
item.description: Russian monthly territorial gains slipped into negative territory in May 2025 for the first time since 2023, according to DeepState monitoring, signaling potential momentum shift in the Ukraine war despite reported Russian advances.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Warns Northern Israel Residents to Evacuate Amid Beirut Tensions
item.description: Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters warned residents of northern Israel to evacuate, threatening escalation if Israel continues attacks on Beirut, as diplomatic exchanges with the US appear to stall.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India Hosts Myanmar's Junta Chief in First Presidential Visit
item.description: Myanmar's military leader Min Aung Hlaing made his first presidential trip to New Delhi, signaling India's pragmatic engagement strategy to counter rising Chinese influence in the region.

item.title: 🇳🇱 Netherlands Suspends Lebanese Asylum Seeker Returns Over Security
item.description: The Netherlands halted the return of Lebanese asylum seekers citing the "fragile security situation" in Lebanon, as regional conflict continues to destabilize civilian displacement patterns.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Hoists Flag Over Beaufort Castle in Southern Lebanon
item.description: Israeli forces seized Lebanon's medieval Beaufort Castle overlooking the country's south, raising the Israeli flag at the strategic position as part of ongoing operations in southern Lebanon.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Orders Strikes on Beirut Suburbs as Hezbollah Conflict Escalates
item.description: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu ordered strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs in response to Hezbollah attacks. Thousands fled the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh as tensions rise amid broader regional conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Warns Israeli Attacks in Lebanon Threaten US Ceasefire
item.description: Iran stated that Israeli attacks in Lebanon threaten the ceasefire agreement with the US. The warning comes as Iran continues to signal it wants any ceasefire to apply across all regional fronts.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Conducts Strikes in Yemen Against Iranian-Backed Forces
item.description: The US military carried out strikes in Yemen targeting Iranian-backed Houthi forces, part of ongoing operations in the region amid heightened tensions with Iran.

item.title: ⚠️ Iran Considering 'Other Fronts' in Conflict With US
item.description: Iran is considering opening "other fronts" in its conflict with the United States, according to state media, as diplomatic efforts appear to stall and regional escalation risks grow.

item.title: 🇺🇳 UN Nuclear Watchdog Says Iran Not Cooperating on Monitoring
item.description: The UN nuclear watchdog reported that Iran is not cooperating with monitoring requirements, raising concerns about transparency in Iran's nuclear program amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Eyes Limited US Deal to Relieve Economic Strain and Buy Time
item.description: Iran is pushing for a limited interim agreement with the United States in a bid to ease mounting economic pressure and buy time without making major nuclear concessions, according to regional analysts.

item.title: 🛢️ Russia Bans Aviation Fuel Exports Until November
item.description: Russia banned aviation fuel exports until November 30, tightening domestic supplies as the country faces logistical challenges amid ongoing military operations.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Dozens Killed in Myanmar Village Explosion
item.description: Witnesses described devastation after an explosion in a Myanmar village killed dozens, with the cause under investigation in the conflict-torn country.

item.title: 🇦🇿 BP Starts Gas Production at Azerbaijan's ACG Field
item.description: BP began commercial non-associated gas production at Azerbaijan's ACG field, expanding energy output in the Caspian region amid global supply diversification efforts.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India GDP Growth Eases in January-March Quarter
item.description: India's GDP growth likely eased in the January-March quarter due to softer external demand, according to economic forecasts, as global economic headwinds affect the world's fifth-largest economy.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Bans Israeli Officials from Defense Show
item.description: Israel's Defence Ministry said France banned Israeli officials from attending a major defense show, highlighting diplomatic tensions between the two countries amid ongoing regional conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran May Block Hormuz, Stops Message Exchanges With US
item.description: Iran's Tasnim news agency reported that Tehran is stopping message exchanges with the US and may block the Strait of Hormuz, escalating threats amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Drafts Sanctions List Targeting US and Allies in 63 Tech Sectors
item.description: A Chinese team has drafted a comprehensive sanctions list targeting the US and its allies across 63 technology sectors, in a major escalation of tech warfare between Beijing and Washington.

item.title: 🇹🇷 US Conducts Strikes on Iran-Linked Targets in Syria
item.description: The US military conducted strikes on Iran-linked targets in Syria, part of ongoing operations against Iranian-backed forces in the region amid escalating tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Says Contradictory US Positions Delaying Diplomacy
item.description: Iran said contradictory US positions and Israeli attacks in Lebanon are delaying diplomatic efforts, as regional tensions continue to complicate potential negotiations.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Patrols Waters East of Taiwan After Japan-Philippines Talks
item.description: China patrolled waters east of Taiwan in response to Japan-Philippines maritime border talks, asserting presence in contested waters amid regional diplomatic activities.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Russia Increases Pressure on Armenia Before Elections
item.description: Russia increased pressure on Armenia ahead of Sunday's elections, according to reports, as regional dynamics shift in the South Caucasus amid Yerevan's Western pivot.

item.title: 🇺🇸 India-US Near Trade Pact on Tariff Terms
item.description: India and the US are nearing a trade pact with tariff terms hinging on Section 301 relief, according to sources, as Washington and New Delhi seek to strengthen economic ties.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC Likely to Raise July Oil Output Despite Hormuz Disruption
item.description: OPEC is likely to raise July oil output targets despite Hormuz disruption concerns, sources said, as the cartel balances market stability with geopolitical risks.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Gets Tougher on Migration as Wealthy Nations Question Asylum
item.description: The EU is adopting tougher migration policies as wealthy nations increasingly question asylum claims, reflecting shifting political dynamics on immigration in Europe.
